features: Perfect Tool: Water Pipe Drain Dredge Tool Is A Perfect Replacement To Chemical Cleaner Compared With Traditional Cheap Plastic Snake Drain Pipe Cleaning Brush Is Absolute More Effective And Durable Moreover Sink Drain Unblockers Has Unique Functions That It Unclog Drain Pipe While Cleaning
High Quality Materials: Wire And Synthetic Plastic Bristles Flexible And Durable Sink Drain Unblockers Are Not Easy To Break When Reaching Into The Sink Water Pipe Cleaner Are For Long Term Use

Ideal Choice: Drain Auger With Brush Is An Ideal Choice For Maintaining And Unclogging Sinks And Pipes Brush Has An Ergonomic Long Handle Design Top Hole Design Sink Drain Cleaning Brushes Is Easy To Store Drainage Cleaning Chain Is Very Suitable For Pipe Sink Cleaning Work

Effectively Clean: Sink Cleaning Brush Can Effectively Clean Rubbish From The Water Pipe Or Sink Spiral Design Of Bristles And Metal Is More Suitable For Clockwise Operation Which Can Improve Work Efficiency And Reduce Brush Damage Durable Hard Wearing Bristles For Effective Cleaning So You Never Miss A Spot

How To Use: Simply Insert The Drain Clog Remover As Far As Possible Into The Drain And Pull It Out Twist And Firm Then Clean The Drain Clog Remover And Dispose Of The Residue Hairbrush Of Our Cleaner Stick Is Rotatable So It Will Get A Better Effect To Clean The Cumulate Hair Dirt Rubbish Of The Pipes
description: Product Description Stainless Steel Flexible Drainage Pipe Cleaner Drain Clog Flexible Sink Snake Helps Unclog Blocked Hair And Unblock Slow Moving Drains Without The Need For Chemicals You Do Not Need To Waste Money And Time Flexible long drain cleaner reaches deep into drains to remove any clogs and debris sink. The unblocker tool is considerably cheaper than a plumber also clears the drains quick and with less effort flexible metal tube has good toughness that can be bent freely. it will take you a minute to clear your sink plughole from the dirt Strong & Flexible Construction Easy to Use Home Improvement Quality Multipurpose Drain Unblocker Tool Excellent Quality Drain Unblocker Is Made Of High-Quality Material Plumbing Snake Is Strong Safe Flexible Reliable And Sturdy Shower Drain Unblocker Is Robust and Durable You Can Use Long Lasting Heavy Duty Drain Unblocker Is Comfortable To Use and Easy to Grip Perfect Tool Sink And Drain Cleaner Is Made Of High Quality Material Drain Cleaner And Clog Remover Is Made Of A Heavy Duty Metal To Ensure There Is No Breakage And Maximum Flexibility. Drain Auger Clog Remover Cleaning Tool With Plastic Handle Is For Easy Comfort While Unclogging Wastepipe Cleaner Is Long Enough To Remove Clogs And Debris To Allow Smooth Drain Pipe Flow.
